zh.lifeSummary: 當John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave於1256年7月20日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福時，他的父親Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave17歲，母親Matilda de Lucy17歲。他於大約1270年與Christian Plessis在英國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1325年9月1日在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年69歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾查阿可姆查阿可姆 普利奧利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave于1256年7月20日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾澤亞格拉福时，他的父亲Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave17岁，母亲Matilda de Lucy17岁。他于大约1270年与Christian Plessis在英国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1325年9月1日在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年69岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾查阿可姆查阿可姆 普利奧利。

nameMeanings.name: Segrave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Seagrave
meanings: English: habitational name from Seagrave (Leicestershire), probably from Old English sēath ‘pit, hole’ + grāf ‘grove’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave was born on 20 July 1256, in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, his father, Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave, was 17 and his mother, Matilda de Lucy, was 17. He married Christian Plessis about 1270, in England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 1 September 1325, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave est né le 20 juillet 1256, à Seagrave, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Lucy, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Christian Plessis environ 1270, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1325, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave am 20. Juli 1256 in Seagrave, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave 17 und seine Mutter Matilda de Lucy 17. Er hat um 1270 in England Christian Plessis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 1. September 1325 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave è nato il il 20 luglio 1256 nel Seagrave, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Matilda de Lucy, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Christian Plessis circa 1270, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 1 settembre 1325, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Segrave 2nd Baron Segraveが1256年7月20日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアセアグラブで生まれた時，父Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segraveは17歳，母Matilda de Lucyは17歳であった。約1270年にイギリスでChristian Plessisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1325年9月1日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで69歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチャコンベチャコンベ プリオリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave(이)가 1256년 7월 20일 영국 레이스스터실르 시그레이브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Lucy(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1270년 영국에서 Christian Plessis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1325년 9월 1일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 차코브 차코브 플리오리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave nasceu em 20 de julho de 1256, em Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Lucy, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Christian Plessis aproximadamente 1270, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1325, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave родился 20 июля 1256 г. в местности сиграв, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Lucy, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Christian Plessis около 1270 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 1 сентября 1325 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности чакомб приори, чакомб, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Segrave 2nd Baron Segrave nació el 20 de julio de 1256, en Seagrave, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Segrave 1st Baron Segrave, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Matilda de Lucy, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Christian Plessis aproximadamente 1270, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1325, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Chacombe Priory, Chacombe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
